title: SignatureRequest
description: An eSignature workflow request that sends a PDF document to one or more recipients for signing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the signature request

document_id.description: ID of the source template document

method.description: Signing method: SendToEach (each recipient signs independently) or SendToGroup (sequential envelope signing)

envelope_name.description: Name for the signing envelope (required for SendToGroup method)

status.description: Current status of the signature request

sign_in_order.description: Whether recipients must sign in the defined order (SendToGroup)

security_pin.description: PIN code required by recipients to access the document

callback_url.description: Webhook URL for signature event notifications

recipients.description: List of recipients for the signature request

created_at.description: Timestamp when the signature request was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the signature request was last updated

Recipient.description: A person invited to sign or fill a signature request document

role.description: Role ID assigned to this recipient (SendToGroup)

message.description: Custom message sent to this recipient
